TestEnvironment.// LlmMode: Auto (default) = use local key if present, else proxy when ServerUrl+ApiKey set. Local = always local. RemoteProxy = always proxy.
TestEnvironment.// Agent mode: Settings used when running with --agent. AgentRole: Recording (only claims recording/auth-setup jobs), Execution (only claims run jobs), Both (default). AgentTags: comma-separated capability tags used by requiredTags job filtering. QueueClaimDeadlineSeconds: janitor fails Queued jobs older than this with no claimant. PreferredAgentFallbackPolicy: Fail (default) or Release for expired-pin jobs.
TestEnvironment.// Data packs: Version-controlled SQL scripts under data/datapacks/{phase}/{envKey}/{NN.subfolder}/{NN.script}.sql, packaged into bin/datapacks/ and run by the WebApi at startup. DESTRUCTIVE — opt-in is per-env only via Environments.<env>.RunDataPacksOnStartup. DataPacksPath is the bin-relative root.
TestEnvironment.// Teardown EXEC allowlist: Stored-procedure name prefixes that per-test-set teardown SQL is allowed to invoke via EXEC. Procs whose name does not start with one of these prefixes are rejected by SqlGuardrails. Default ['usp_'] pairs with the convention for dev-installed teardown procs shipped via the data-pack runner. Set to [] to disallow EXEC entirely.
TestEnvironment.// DB connection registry: Logical name → SQL Server connection string for DB-check post-steps. Keys here are the top-level fallback; per-env overrides live under Environments.<env>.DbConnections. Add a new key (e.g. SdrReportingDb) here or per-env to make it usable as connectionKey on a DbCheck post-step — zero code changes. The legacy BravoDb falls back to BravoDbConnectionString when neither dict defines it.
TestEnvironment.// Service Bus connection registry: Logical name → Azure Service Bus namespace for event-assert post-steps. Keys here are the top-level fallback; per-env overrides live under Environments.<env>.ServiceBusConnections. AuthMode='ConnectionString' uses ConnectionString; AuthMode='AzureAd' uses DefaultAzureCredential against FullyQualifiedNamespace (Azure CLI locally, managed identity in prod). ManagedIdentityClientId is optional — set when a user-assigned MI is required. Add a new key here or per-env to make it usable as connectionKey on an EventAssert post-step — zero code changes.

AseXml.// Deferred verification scheduling: Post-delivery UI verifications with WaitBeforeSeconds > VerificationDeferThresholdSeconds are queued rather than blocking the delivery agent's slot. The claim agent retries via re-enqueue until the verification passes or the deadline is reached.

TestEnvironment.// Chat Assistant: Persisted Assistant conversations are stored per-user in chat_conversations / chat_messages (SQLite). MaxConversationsPerUser caps how many threads survive — older threads are pruned on the next create. MaxMessagesPerConversation bounds the LLM prompt size; the DB still keeps every turn for replay in the UI.
TestEnvironment.// Backup: Scheduled SQLite hot-backup. Backup.Enabled=false by default. Backup.Directory must be a separate host bind-mount -- not a path inside the named data volume. Windows containers: c: ackups; Linux: /backups.

sumo-retail._DataTeardownEnabled_help: Opt-in flag for per-test-set SQL teardown. Set to true only on dev/test envs where DELETE statements are safe — never on production. Defaults to false when absent.
sumo-retail._RunDataPacksOnStartup_help: Opt-in flag for executing version-controlled data-pack SQL scripts (data/datapacks/...) against this env's BravoDbConnectionString at WebApi startup. Set to true only on dev/test envs.
sumo-retail._DbConnections_help: Per-env overrides for DB-check post-step connections. Falls back to top-level TestEnvironment.DbConnections, then (for BravoDb only) to BravoDbConnectionString.
sumo-retail._AllowDbDryRun_help: Per-env opt-out for the 'Try query' UI button (POST /api/db-check/dry-run). Default true.
sumo-retail._AllowApiDryRun_help: Per-env opt-out for the 'Try Call' UI button in the API step editor (POST /api/api-step/dry-run). Default true.
sumo-retail._ServiceBusConnections_help: Per-env Service Bus namespace overrides. Falls back to top-level TestEnvironment.ServiceBusConnections when an env doesn't define the key. AuthMode='AzureAd' below picks up DefaultAzureCredential (Azure CLI locally, managed identity in prod) so no secret is checked into config.
sumo-retail._AllowEventAssertPeek_help: Per-env opt-out for the editor's 'Peek messages' UI button (POST /api/event-assert/peek). Default true.
